## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (bumps major version)
- [ ] Documentation / tooling / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Editor code stays vanilla JS (no framework dependencies added to `src/inject/`)
- [ ] UI changes stay inside the Shadow DOM (no style leaks)
- [ ] Every new editable action is undoable (uses `sendChangeWithUndo`)
- [ ] I ran `node -c` on every file I touched
- [ ] I tested against at least one real dev server and the flow works end-to-end
- [ ] I updated docs (README / SKILL.md) if behavior changed
